tasks.subject: Task 1: News feature — content collection, component, JSON endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a news content collection, a News.astro component with a real empty state, and a /news.json endpoint.

**Files:**
- Create: src/content/news/.gitkeep
- Modify: src/content.config.ts
- Create: src/components/News.astro
- Create: src/pages/news.json.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run build succeeds.
- dist/news.json exists and contains [].
- News.astro with zero entries shows the empty-state line, no card list.

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build && cat dist/news.json -> exits 0, prints [].

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/content/news/.gitkeep", "abr-move/src/content.config.ts", "abr-move/src/components/News.astro", "abr-move/src/pages/news.json.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build && cat dist/news.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "dist/news.json contains []", "empty-state text renders with zero entries"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: YouTubeCarousel.astro — placeholder component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three-card 'coming soon' placeholder section, no fabricated video data, future data shape documented in a comment.

**Files:**
- Create: src/components/YouTubeCarousel.astro

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run build succeeds.
- Renders three cards with play-icon placeholder + 'Скоро' label, no fake titles/links.

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build -> exits 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/components/YouTubeCarousel.astro"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "three placeholder cards, no fabricated data"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Split Solutions.astro into Robur / Civil groups
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract ModuleCard.astro, render existing 5-module data as two labeled groups (Topomatic Robur / Autodesk Civil 3D) instead of one flat grid.

**Files:**
- Create: src/components/ModuleCard.astro
- Modify: src/components/Solutions.astro (full replacement)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run build succeeds.
- Robur group: RoadStyle, Profile Tracker, Model Manager, Width Import (4 cards).
- Civil group: Slab Designer, Width Import (2 cards).
- CTA banner appears once after both groups, links to #downloads.

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build -> exits 0. Visual check in Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/components/ModuleCard.astro", "abr-move/src/components/Solutions.astro"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "Robur group has 4 cards", "Civil group has 2 cards", "single CTA banner after both groups"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: About.astro — swap support block for CTA buttons
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace About's right-column support block with Модули (#solutions) and Подробнее (GitHub profile) CTAs.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/components/About.astro:81-104

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run build succeeds.
- Right column shows stats grid unchanged, then one paragraph, then Модули (btn-accent, #solutions) and Подробнее (btn-outline, https://github.com/Y-Abramov, new tab) buttons.
- Old Поддержать/Telegram links gone from About.astro.

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build -> exits 0. Visual check in Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/components/About.astro"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "Модули and Подробнее CTAs present", "old support links removed"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
tasks.activeForm: Swapping About.astro support block for CTAs

tasks.subject: Task 5: Footer.astro — add Поддержать button
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a support-trigger button to the Контакты column, reusing existing .support-btn/.heart-icon CSS.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/components/Footer.astro:53-67

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run build succeeds.
- Контакты column shows Telegram/GitHub/VK/Email then a Поддержать button with id=support-btn.
- Hover triggers .support-btn:hover .heart-icon treatment from global.css:104-108.

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build -> exits 0. Visual + click check in Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/components/Footer.astro"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "support button with id=support-btn present in footer"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Wire everything into index.astro, update Header nav
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Compose full page from all components, drop stub hero/fetch/inline markup, keep QR modal working via Footer's button, update Header nav label.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/components/Header.astro:5
- Modify: src/pages/index.astro (full replacement)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run build succeeds.
- Page order: Header, Hero, About, Solutions (Robur/Civil), News (empty state), YouTubeCarousel (3 placeholders), Downloads, Footer.
- No 'Сайт в разработке' text anywhere.
- Header nav shows Новости -> #news, scrolls to News section.
- Footer Поддержать button opens QR modal; Escape/backdrop/close button all close it.
- dist/news.json still returns [].

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build -> exits 0. Manual check via npm run dev: scroll whole page, click every nav link, open/close support modal from footer.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/components/Header.astro", "abr-move/src/pages/index.astro"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "correct section order", "no construction-stub text", "nav Новости scrolls to #news", "footer support button opens/closes modal", "news.json still []"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
